response.justification: The candidate shows strong backend/distributed systems experience (e.g., microservices, real-time systems at Dunnhumby) and some AI/agentic work (MCP frameworks at re:cinq), but lacks direct fintech or credit-risk experience. While leadership in scaling teams is implied, there's no explicit mention of leading 10+ engineers. The resume is also heavily skewed toward web/mobile projects rather than AI-native fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and backend expertise (event-driven architectures, microservices, real-time systems)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent frameworks (MCP, custom orchestration at re:cinq)
Proven track record in scaling teams and improving processes (TDD, CI/CD, team leadership at Altom/RIDE)
concerns: No explicit fintech or credit-risk system experience (critical for this role)
Limited evidence of leading large-scale engineering teams (10+ engineers) or handling regulated environments
Resumé lacks depth in agentic AI production systems (e.g., stateful agents, real-time inference, evaluation pipelines)
